quote: Time is dead and meaning has no meaning. Existence is upside-down and I reign supreme. WELCOME, ONE AND ALL, TO WEIRDMAGEDDON.
Hey, wanna hear my impression of you in about three seconds? AAAAAAHHHH!
I've been watching you, kid. You've got that look — that hungry look. Like you actually want to know the truth.
A-B-C-D-E-F-G — help me trap souls and get the key!
Heh heh heh... just as planned.
Reality is an illusion, the universe is a hologram, buy gold, BYE!
You can't stop what's coming. The rift will open. I will be free. And then... the fun begins.
I've got some children I need to make into corpses.
Sixer! It's been too long! Or has it been long enough? I always lose track when I'm everywhere at once.
Dream a little dream of me.
The show isn't over when the hero loses. It's over when I SAY it's over.
Remember: reality is an illusion, the universe is a hologram, and existence itself is a punchline. The joke's on all of you.
I am the master of the mindscape. In here, I make the rules — and the rules say you lose.
